description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy on an ubuntu-latest job to build with different combinations of compilers (gcc, clang), build types (release, debug), and build options (default, link_off, translations_only, libretro). For each combination, check out the repository with submodules, install dependencies and xvfb, then use CMake to configure and build the project, or use a libretro-specific build command. Run tests with ctest for default builds.
